chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-295 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.09.2024 Mr. Hyder Ali Maheri advocate along with applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. ZULFIQAR ALI SANGI, J.- Applicant seeks pre-arrest bail in Crime No.13/2024 registered at P.S. Taluka Tando Muhammad Khan U/s 506, 337- F(i), 504, 114, 35 PPC after his bail was declined by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-II Tando Muhammad Khan vide order dated 20.03.2024. 2. The contents of FIR need not to be reproduced as the same are already mentioned in the memo of bail application. 3. Bail is sought only on the ground that the co-accused Hakim who is assigned same role has been granted bail by the trial court while by assigning wrong impression against the present applicant his interim pre-arrest bail was recalled. When confronted with APG as to whether role of both the accused is similar, she admitted it, however, opposed confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail as being non-bailable offence. 4. Heard learned counsel for the applicant and APG and perused the material available on record. 5. From perusal of order dated 20.03.2024 and contents of FIR, it reflects that both the accused Hakim and Gulab Gul (applicant) having similar role from which Hakim has been granted bail by the trial court and the case against the present applicant is also on same footing. 6. Under such circumstances, the bail application is allowed and the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 21.03.2024 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE Ali Haider
